_comment__file: Scientific-Inkscape user-editable config file. Keys starting with underscores are comments and ignored.
_comment_identical_dirs: List of directory groups that should be treated as equivalent. Each inner list is a set of alternate roots. Used to substitute paths when a linked file is missing across machines/cloud drives.
_comment_subdirs: Extra subdirectories to try when a linked file is missing. For each candidate path, find_missing_links() also tries: dirname/<subdir>/basename.
_comment_dark_mode_colors: Optional exact overrides for dark-mode inversion. Keys/values should be SVG color strings (hex #RRGGBB recommended). Alpha is ignored.
